scripts.dev:backend: cargo watch -w crates -w subagents -- cargo run -p eunomio-bin-local -- --port 3001 --allow-dev-url
scripts.build: npm --prefix helper install && npm --prefix helper run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo build --release --manifest-path Cargo.toml --bin eunomio
scripts.install:bin: npm --prefix helper install && npm --prefix helper run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && cargo install --path crates/eunomio-bin-local --force && npm run clean:helper-cache
